GSB Token Analyst.description: Full token analysis — price, liquidity, volume, 24h change, verdict
GSB Token Analyst.instruction: Analyze token {address} on Base — fetch price, 24h change, liquidity, volume, market cap, and give a buy/hold/avoid verdict

GSB Token Analyst.description: Find top holders of a token and classify each wallet
GSB Token Analyst.instruction: Find the top 10 holders of token {address} on Base using Blockscout. For each wallet show: address, % held, wallet class (whale/smart money/retail/bot), last activity

GSB Token Analyst.description: Track liquidity changes and detect pool health
GSB Token Analyst.instruction: Check liquidity pool health for token {address} on Base. Report: current liquidity, 24h liquidity change, LP token distribution, rug risk score (low/medium/high)

GSB Wallet Profiler.description: Full wallet profile — tx history, holdings, classification
GSB Wallet Profiler.instruction: Profile wallet {address} on Base — fetch ETH balance, token holdings, tx count, wallet age, and classify as: whale/smart money/retail/bot/new

GSB Wallet Profiler.description: Detect if a wallet is smart money based on win rate and PnL
GSB Wallet Profiler.instruction: Analyze wallet {address} trading history on Base. Calculate: win rate on token trades, estimated PnL, tokens bought early (within 24h of launch), smart money score (0-100)

GSB Wallet Profiler.description: Monitor recent transactions and flag notable moves
GSB Wallet Profiler.instruction: Get the last 20 transactions for wallet {address} on Base. Flag any: large transfers >$10k, new token positions, DEX trades, contract interactions. Summarize the pattern

GSB Alpha Scanner.description: Scan Base for trending tokens with momentum
GSB Alpha Scanner.instruction: Scan Base chain for trending tokens right now using GeckoTerminal. Return top 5 by volume with: symbol, price, 24h change, volume, why it's trending

GSB Alpha Scanner.description: Find newly launched tokens in the last 24h with strong early signals
GSB Alpha Scanner.instruction: Find tokens launched in the last 24 hours on Base with: liquidity >$50k, volume >$100k, holders >100. For each: symbol, contract address, launch time, liquidity, initial signal (strong/moderate/weak)

GSB Alpha Scanner.description: Detect tokens with unusual volume spikes in the last hour
GSB Alpha Scanner.instruction: Find tokens on Base with volume spikes in the last 1 hour — look for tokens where 1h volume is >3x their 6h average. Return: symbol, address, spike multiplier, current price, 1h change

GSB Alpha Scanner.description: Scan a specific chain for alpha signals
GSB Alpha Scanner.instruction: Scan {chain} chain for trending tokens and alpha signals. Return top opportunities with price momentum and volume confirmation

GSB Thread Writer.description: Write a crypto Twitter thread about any topic
GSB Thread Writer.instruction: Write a 5-tweet crypto Twitter thread about: {topic}. Make it engaging, use data where possible, end with a strong CTA. Format as Tweet 1:, Tweet 2:, etc.

GSB Thread Writer.description: Write a formatted alpha report for a token or opportunity
GSB Thread Writer.instruction: Write a crypto alpha report about {topic}. Include: thesis, key metrics, entry considerations, risks, price targets. Format for CT (Crypto Twitter) — punchy and data-driven

GSB Thread Writer.description: Write a market update post summarizing current conditions
GSB Thread Writer.instruction: Write a crypto market update post for right now covering: overall sentiment, top movers on Base, key narrative, what to watch. Keep it under 280 chars for a single tweet or expand to thread if needed
